title: Crafted Knowledge 3
description: A kitchen-sink modpack designed for beginners (W.I.P.)
body:
![Crafted Knowledge 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8kiidq7c/images/54404ed3b830fdc8225acd54282de7625161196e.png)
# About
**If you having trouble playing modpacks because you don't know what are you doing, this is the modpack for you.**

This modpack is a kitchen-sink modpack with the main purpose is to teach new player the basics about modded minecraft. The project is currently W.I.P. and more are comming in the future. 

This modpack contains 300+ mods.  
Minimum RAM: 6 GB  
Recommended RAM: 12 GB

External Mods:
- [Glodium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/glodium) (Is tehnically on modrinth but it didn't released any 1.21 files on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/glodium))
- [Ars Nouveau](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-nouveau) (Is tehnically on modrinth but it didn't released any 1.21 files on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau))
- [Aquaculture 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture) (CurseForge)
- [AE2: Craftin Tree](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ae2-crafting-tree) (CurseForge)
- [Server Performance - Smooth Chunk Save](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smooth-chunk-save) (CurseForge)
- [Connectivity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/connectivity) (CurseForge)
- [Recipe Essentials](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/recipe-essentials-forge-fabric) (Curseforge)
- [Leaky - Item Lag Fix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/leaky) (CurseForge)
- [Fast Async World Save](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fast-async-world-save-forge-fabric) (CurseForge)
- [fix GPU memory leak](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fix-gpu-memory-leak) (CurseForge)

Crafted Knowledge Series:
- [Crafted Knowledge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/crafted-knowledge) (Curseforge)
- [Crafted Knowledge 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/crafted-knowledge-2) (Curseforge)
